meaning: n.(旅馆车票,戏票等的)登记人
examples: Joe, Pink, and Booker howled with delight.
He knew he had arrived when he was shortlisted for the Booker prize.
Sparky Cosper already has a small exhibition in his honour at Booker Airfield.
Others in literature on the list include Booker Prize-winning author Penelope Lively, 78, who is made a dame.
Booker has been working to establish himself as the heir-apparent for 2014 -- which Lautenberg did not appreciate.
